title: Nurse
description:
Morrow is redefining preventive healthcare by integrating precision medicine, digital tools, and lifestyle interventions in a seamless ecosystem. Our flagship centre in Singapore combines a medical clinic with a next-generation lifestyle facility, supported by AI, health coaching, and the latest in diagnostics and recovery modalities.


We believe in Trust, Connection, Empowerment, and Impact. These values drive every action we take.

At Morrow, we are guided by two sets of commitments:


Our Operating Principles – how we work and hold ourselves accountable as a team:

Mindful. Ownership. Rhythm. Winning Together.


Our Brand Promises – what we bring to our clients and the lens for everything we create:

Connection. Impact. Trust. Empowerment. (CITE)


This isn’t just medicine. It’s a movement. If you are ready to shape the future of longevity care and make a lasting impact, join us in redefining healthcare for Singapore and the world.


Job Title: Nurse

Location: Morrow Flagship – Singapore

Reports To: Head of Clinical Operations


Role Summary

As a Clinic Nurse in a Lifestyle Medicine-focused healthcare facility, you will play a central role in delivering holistic, preventive, and precision-based medical care. This role blends traditional nursing responsibilities with Lifestyle Medicine and advanced health optimisation services. Reporting to the Head of Clinical Operations, your role will ensure exceptional patient experiences and clinical outcomes while ensuring nursing compliance with regulatory requirements by MOH and SNB.


Key Responsibilities

  • Effective delivery of all nursing services including phlebotomy services, vitals taking, body composition analysis, and any diagnostic testing our clinic offers
  • Support or chaperone physicians or allied health team during procedures, consultations, and advanced diagnostics
  • Collaborate in developing personalised lifestyle intervention plans using the 6 pillars of lifestyle medicine, provide ongoing follow-up coordinating their continuity of their journey in our clinic and ensure seamless transitions between allied health providers
  • Maintaining exceptional patient service standards with a focus on discretion, comfort, and seamless care
  • Administer or prescribe medications in accordance with guidelines, policies, and procedures
    Handle specimen logistics with third-party labs, ensuring time-sensitive tests follow appropriate handover protocols.
  • Manage medical notes and proper documentation, maintain an accurate recording system, and ensure compliance with record-keeping protocols, PDPA and MOH Records Retention Guidelines
  • Ensure clinic cleanliness, infection control, regulatory compliance, and quality assurance protocols are met, in accordance with MOH and NEA infection control regulations
  • Collaborating with the nursing team to monitor and manage clinical inventory, supplies, and cold-chain items, and informing HOD of discrepancy if any
  • Assist the Assistant Practice Manager in incident reporting, SOP updates, and clinic audits as required by MOH licensing and renewal cycles
  • Participate in ongoing professional development and contribute to a culture of excellence, innovation, and continuous improvement

Why Join Us

This is a career-defining opportunity to shape the future of longevity medicine while working alongside world-class clinicians and technologists. You will contribute to initiatives that directly lead to extending human healthspan while establishing Singapore as the global hub for longevity innovation.At Morrow, you will not only help define operational excellence but also build the culture, rhythm, and future of preventative health. You won’t just be joining a team. You will be co-creating tomorrow.


Qualifications & Experience

  • Diploma/Bachelor's Degree in Nursing, with valid SNB registration
  • Active BCLS certification or willing to renew
  • Ability to handling situations with professionalism and empathy
  • Ability to analyze rapid ground changing situations efficiently and quickly, especially in a medical emergency
  • Willingness to learn and adapt to ongoing education in lifestyle medicine, personalised medicine, and innovation
  • Passion and interest for preventive healthcare, lifestyle medicine and longevity medicine are highly desirable

Apply here: https://apply.workable.com/morrow-health/


Morrow Health Pte Ltd is an equal opportunity employer committed to building a diverse and inclusive team.
